headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $26
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $25 to $26.
